summary: Comprehensive audit of route cleanup and structured name standard implementation. All 17 test features verified. Backend: 22/22 tests pass. Frontend: All public forms have first_name/last_name fields, route redirects work correctly, Settings Hub lock gate functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All route cleanup and structured name features verified. Route redirects: /register/affiliate -> /partners/apply, /affiliate/portal -> /partners/apply, /affiliate/dashboard -> /login (auth required). All public forms (Checkout, CheckoutV2, GroupDealCheckout, AffiliateApply, QuoteRequest, OrderRequest, ServiceDetailLeadAware, ExpansionPremium, SoftLeadCaptureModal) have first_name/last_name fields. Terms page has 6 sections. Settings Hub lock gate shows password prompt for sensitive tabs (Sales & Commission, Payout Settings, Affiliate Policy).

features_tested.affiliate_landing_cta: PASS - 'Join as Affiliate' button points to /partners/apply

structured_name_forms.CheckoutPage: PASS - has first_name/last_name fields (data-testid: checkout-firstname, checkout-lastname)
structured_name_forms.CheckoutPageV2: PASS - has first_name/last_name fields (data-testid: checkout-v2-firstname, checkout-v2-lastname)
structured_name_forms.GroupDealCheckout: PASS - has first_name/last_name fields with 'Hi {first_name}' personalization
structured_name_forms.AffiliateApplyPage: PASS - has first_name/last_name fields (data-testid: apply-first-name, apply-last-name)
structured_name_forms.QuoteRequestPage: PASS - has first_name/last_name fields (data-testid: quote-first-name, quote-last-name)
structured_name_forms.PublicOrderRequestPage: PASS - has first_name/last_name fields (data-testid: order-first-name, order-last-name)
structured_name_forms.ServiceDetailLeadAwarePage: PASS - has first_name/last_name fields (data-testid: lead-first-name, lead-last-name)
structured_name_forms.ExpansionPremiumPage: PASS - has first_name/last_name fields (data-testid: interest-first-name, interest-last-name)
structured_name_forms.SoftLeadCaptureModal: PASS - has first_name/last_name fields (data-testid: lead-first-name, lead-last-name)
